_meta.title: Dynamic Animated Hero Section with Gradient
_meta.description: A visually striking React hero section featuring a gradient-text animation that cycles through vibrant colors, SVG line-drawing effects for geometric shapes, subtle background pattern movement , and a pulsing interactive CTA button
